exercises.title: Network Topology Simulator
exercises.description: Build a classical network topology simulator.
exercises.expectedOutput: Network simulator with routing and metrics
hints: Use adjacency list for graph representation
Implement Dijkstra's algorithm for shortest path
Track bandwidth and latency per link

exercises.title: TCP Handshake Simulator
exercises.description: Implement a TCP three-way handshake simulation.
exercises.expectedOutput: Complete TCP handshake and teardown simulator
hints: Track state machine: CLOSED → SYN_SENT → ESTABLISHED → FIN_WAIT

exercises.title: Security Vulnerability Analyzer
exercises.description: Create a tool to analyze classical network security vulnerabilities.
tasks: Compare classical vs quantum security properties
exercises.expectedOutput: Security analysis tool with comparison report
hints: Enumerate attack types and their detectability

exercises.title: Signal Attenuation Calculator
exercises.description: Build a calculator for fiber optic signal attenuation.
tasks: Compare classical amplification vs quantum limits
hints: Quantum links limited to ~100 km without repeaters
